mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tool_call_log (task_id, step_id, tool_name, actual_tool_name, tool_call_id, arguments_json, result_summary, status, latency_ms, error_message, error_type, blocked_by_policy, argument_truncated, result_truncated, retry_count, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{stepId} AS uuid), #{toolName}, #{actualToolName}, #{toolCallId}, CAST(#{argumentsJson} AS jsonb), #{resultSummary}, #{status}, #{latencyMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorType}, #{blockedByPolicy}, #{argumentTruncated}, #{resultTruncated}, #{retryCount}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_id, tool_name, actual_tool_name, tool_call_id, arguments_json::text AS arguments_json, result_summary, status, latency_ms, error_message, error_type, blocked_by_policy, argument_truncated, result_truncated, retry_count, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tool_call_log WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.update:
UPDATE tool_call_log
result_summary = #{resultSummary}, status = #{status}, latency_ms = #{latencyMs}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_type = #{errorType}, blocked_by_policy = #{blockedByPolicy}, argument_truncated = #{argumentTruncated}, result_truncated = #{resultTruncated}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt},
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_id, tool_name, actual_tool_name, tool_call_id, arguments_json::text AS arguments_json, result_summary, status, latency_ms, error_message, error_type, blocked_by_policy, argument_truncated, result_truncated, retry_count, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tool_call_log WHERE task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) AND status = 'RUNNING'
